{"query":"LeBron James Ken doll Mattel release height","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1790,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://corporate.mattel.com/news/barbie-debuts-lebron-james-doll-marking-the-brands-first-kenbassador","title":"Barbie Debuts LeBron James Doll, Marking the Brand’s First Kenbassador","content":"Barbie is teaming up with the LeBron James Family Foundation to release the first Ken® doll of a professional athlete, LeBron James, to recognize his positive impact on culture, style, and community.
"Ken is Barbie’s longtime best friend and supporter,” said Krista Berger, Senior Vice President of Barbie and Global Head of Dolls, Mattel.
The LeBron James doll not only captures his effortless style, but also his height, standing one inch taller than the standard Ken doll in custom, larger packaging.
(NASDAQ: MAT) is dropping the first-ever collaboration between UNO and Nike, featuring a product line developed in coordination with the 2019-20 Kia NBA Most Valuable Player and UNO fan, Giannis Antetokounmpo.
“Partnering with this iconic brand and world-renowned athlete is the perfect celebration of UNO’s 50th anniversary.”
- Footwear line featuring Nike’s signature Zoom Freak 3, Air Force 1 and Offline with UNO colorways and Giannis’s design.
The deck will be sold on Mattel Creations and NTWRK starting November 11.
The cards and other rewards will be available during the UNO x Giannis in-app event from November 1 through November 30."},{"url":"https://people.com/lebron-james-now-has-his-very-own-ken-doll-becoming-the-brands-first-kenbassador-11711343","title":"LeBron James Gets His Very Own Ken Doll","content":"The basketball legend, 40, has teamed up with Mattel to become the brand's very first Kenbassador and launch his very own doll.
The Los Angeles Lakers power forward worked with Mattel to design the doll's outfit, which features some meaningful touches; a custom varsity jacket over the LeBron James Family Foundation’s signature We Are Family T-shirt, Nike Terminator High sneakers, Beats headphones, sunglasses, a fanny pack, a watch and his perennial "I Promise" band.
“As a young kid, I was fortunate to have role models who not only inspired me but also showed me what’s possible through hard work and dedication,” James says in a press release.
The newfound Kenbassador title brings the character of Ken to fans in a whole new way ahead of Barbie's 65th anniversary in 2026.
The Barbie Signature LeBron James Kenbassadors doll will be available at select Target stores and online at Target, Amazon, Walmart and Mattel Creations for $75 starting Monday, April 14 at 12 a.m."},{"url":"https://au.creations.mattel.com/products/lebron-james-kenbassadors-doll","title":"LeBron James Kenbassadors Doll – Mattel Creations Australia","content":"From November 19, 2025, at 9:00am AEDT through November 20, 2025, at 8:59am AEDT, only Barbie Club 59 members can buy this doll at MattelCreations.com, while supplies last."},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7877zznd0po","title":"LeBron James becomes first male athlete with a Ken doll","content":"The doll features the Los Angeles Lakers basketball player in his pre-game fashion and reflects his height - it's an inch taller than the standard Ken doll.
In reality, the athlete is 6ft 9in tall.
Trump announced on Wednesday that tariffs on goods from China would increase to 125%.
Even with four NBA titles, two Olympic gold medals, and a scoring record to his name, Mr James says his new title of "Kenbassador" hits differently—because it's about more than basketball."}]}
